# ayeepat

> Independent AI builder and designer. Builds real, useful things with AI agents, automation, AI image generation and bold design — from idea to shipped, end to end. Currently available for new projects.

ayeepat works at the intersection of AI and design: agents that do real work, automations that delete boring tasks, and generated visuals that don't look generated. Every product is designed and built solo — idea, design, code, deploy.

## Projects

- [Simplex Capital](https://simplex-cap.com): Flagship project. Full corporate web presence for an international tech fund — strategy, design system, copy direction and build, end to end.
- [FluentCode](https://fluentlycode.xyz): Free platform for learning multiple coding languages — pick a language, start typing, get fluent. No paywalls.
- [VibedGallery](https://vibedgallery.com): Curated gallery showcasing websites and SaaS products — where good interfaces go to get noticed.

## Skills

- Core: AI Agents, Automation, AI Image Generation, Design
- Also: Prompt Engineering, LLM Integrations, Workflow Orchestration, Web & Product Design, Generative Art Pipelines, Rapid Prototyping, AI Tooling & APIs

## Contact
